validation_debt_system_v1.description: Registry of validation debt system modules — addresses false positives in satellite audits

modules.name: satellite_validation_debt.py
modules.purpose: Formal registry and API for recording validation debts

modules.name: validate_satellite_functional.py
modules.purpose: Functional validation of satellites (endpoints, not just files)
modules.invoked_by: manual / CI pipeline for empirical proof

modules.name: postmortem_validation_analysis.py
modules.purpose: Post-mortem analysis of validation debt patterns
modules.invoked_by: manual / audit pipeline for systemic findings

modules.name: audit_d13_validation_debt.py
